**Detail:** Of the 15 merged PRs total, 9 referenced a Linear issue via `closes_linear`. One of those (PR #1024 → ENG-134) had its Linear issue already in `done` state, so it was excluded. The remaining 8 have their Linear issues in states ranging from `backlog`, `in_progress`, `in_review`, to `canceled` — none of which are `done`.

{"code":"(def issue-state-map (into {} (map (juxt :id :state) all-linear-issues)))

(def results (filter 
  (fn [item] (not= "done" (get issue-state-map (:closes_linear item))))
  prs-with-linear))

(map (fn [pr] {:pr (:number pr) :linear-issue (:closes_linear pr) :linear-state (get issue-state-map (:closes_linear pr))}) results)"}
